content.json:
# Is AI Native Monitoring

Azure Workbook for scan and report telemetry. These views use the `AppEvents` table populated in the Log Analytics workspace by the backend Application Insights integration.

content.query:
AppEvents
| where Name == "scan_completed"
| summarize total_scans = sum(ItemCount)
content.title: Total scans

content.query:
AppEvents
| where Name == "report_created"
| summarize total_reports = sum(ItemCount)
content.title: Total reports

content.query:
AppEvents
| where Name == "scan_completed"
| make-series scans = sum(ItemCount) default = 0 on TimeGenerated from ago(14d) to now() step 1d
content.title: Scan volume over time

content.query:
AppEvents
| where Name == "scan_completed"
| project TimeGenerated, repo_name = tostring(Properties.repo_name), verdict = tostring(Properties.verdict), score = todouble(Measurements.score), duration_ms = todouble(Measurements.duration_ms)
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Recent scans

content.query:
let scans = AppEvents
| where Name == "scan_completed"
| project scan_key = tostring(Properties.scan_key), scan_time = TimeGenerated, repo_name = tostring(Properties.repo_name), score = todouble(Measurements.score), verdict = tostring(Properties.verdict);
let reports = AppEvents
| where Name == "report_created"
| project scan_key = tostring(Properties.scan_key), report_time = TimeGenerated, report_id = tostring(Properties.report_id);
scans
| join kind=leftouter reports on scan_key
| order by scan_time desc
content.title: Recent reports joined to scans
